title: Melting Korean Nutella Bowl
description: A sour and shattering solo dinner polish dish featuring nutella, served in a stone bowl, jain friendly.
instructions: Preheat the stone bowl by filling it with hot water and letting it sit for 5 minutes.
Dry the stone bowl with a towel and add the sesame oil to the bottom.
Add the rice cakes to the stone bowl and sprinkle with Korean chili flakes and salt.
Place the stone bowl over low heat and cook for 2 minutes on each side.
Remove the stone bowl from the heat and add the chilled Nutella on top of the rice cakes.
Squeeze the lime juice over the Nutella and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
Let the Nutella melt slightly and serve immediately.
Be careful when handling the hot stone bowl.
Use a trivet or oven mitt to protect your table from the hot bowl.
